statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Owner Workflow slice: a mobile-friendly No-Start Workflow on [diagnostics.html](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/diagnostics.html:89). It routes no-crank, slow-crank, normal-crank/no-start, recent electrical work, and roadside cases into existing battery, fuse, garage-note, and emergency-card references without changing repair specs, fuse ratings, or fuse positions.

Also updated search and verification hooks:
- [search-data.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/search-data.js:346) adds `No-Start Workflow` and owner-language terms like `truck wont start`, `clicking`, and `slow crank`.
- [shared-ui.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/shared-ui.js:3697) expands search synonyms.
- [tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1:228) now asserts `truck wont start` surfaces the workflow.
- [service-worker.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/service-worker.js:1) cache bumped to `ridgeline-console-v249`.
- Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, and `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`.

Verification:
- Internal link/anchor audit passed for 16 HTML files.
- Edge `--dump-dom` still hit the known empty DOM failure.
- Playwright/Chrome fallback passed for desktop and iPhone-width diagnostics rendering, no horizontal overflow, search result coverage, and Search Escape cleanup.
- Screenshots saved under `debug-screenshots/audit-v249-*`.

Sources used and recorded in backlog:
- https://techinfo.honda.com/rjanisis/pubs/OM/AH/AT6Z1919OM/enu/AT6Z1919OMEN.PDF
- https://techinfo.honda.com/rjanisis/pubs/QS/AH/BTJB1919GW/enu/GUID-C68F4997-76C9-42F4-9101-6ACD79C71899.html

Next safe slice: build a trailer-light guided diagnostic mini-flow using existing Hitch, Hood fuse, connector, and adapter references.
